bead.title: test: harden SDK governed workflow parity
bead.description:
Context: CONTRACT-009 requires SDK methods `previewMutation`, `commitIntent`, `approveIntent`, `rejectIntent`, `explainPolicy`, `queryAudit`, and `rollbackDryRun` to map to the governed GraphQL workflow with stable success/approval/stale/mismatch/authz outcomes. Existing SDK tests cover request shapes, but TP-001 needs autonomous parity evidence and CI enforcement.

In-scope files: `sdk/typescript/src/graphql-client.ts`, `sdk/typescript/test/graphql-client.test.ts`, SDK docs/types if needed, and STP rows that explicitly name SDK parity such as US-107-AC6.
Out-of-scope: server-side intent behavior and CLI behavior.
Implementation hint: add tests that assert SDK helper outcomes match GraphQL field vocabulary for success, stale/mismatch, denied/authz, and approval-required cases using mock GraphQL responses or a local contract fixture.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cd sdk/typescript && npm test -- --run` passes.
2. `cd sdk/typescript && npm run lint` passes.
3. The executable @covers scanner reports SDK citations for any SDK parity STP rows changed by this bead.
4. CONTRACT-009 method names remain exported and typed.
